summary: Tested nutrition (БЖУ) backend CRUD, admin ItemDialog nutrition inputs, mobile LanguageSwitcher icon variant + popover + i18n switch, desktop pill LanguageSwitcher visibility, nutrition badge in client menu card, and compact header regression. ALL FEATURES WORK AS EXPECTED — 100% pass on backend and frontend.
critical_code_review_comments: MenuItemUpdate uses filter `v is not None` — so callers cannot explicitly clear a nutrition field to null once it's set (would need PATCH semantics or an explicit sentinel). Acceptable for MVP but should be documented.

ItemDialog name/price inputs have no data-testid — added would help future test reliability (e.g. item-name-input, item-price-input, save-item-btn). Not blocking; nutrition inputs correctly expose data-testid.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up NUTRI_E2E_TEST item on Demo Restaurant (id e9c64242) and myata (deleted at end). No residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nutrition backend fields: nutrition_protein/fat/carbs/kcal/kj Optional[float]=None on MenuItem/Create/Update, endpoints under /api/restaurants/{rid}/menu-items. NutritionBadge component in /app/frontend/src/components/menu/NutritionBadge.jsx renders 'на 100 г: Б X • Ж Y • У Z • K ккал / M кДж' with data-testid=nutrition-badge-{item.id}. LanguageSwitcher variant=icon uses data-testid=lang-toggle-btn (mobile only, md:hidden) and data-testid=lang-btn-{ru|en|zh}; pill variant is in md:flex desktop container. Header height stays 264.5px between scrollY 0 and 300.

backend_nutrition_crud.POST_without_nutrition: PASS - all 5 fields returned as null

nutrition_badge_client_menu.text: на 100 г:Б 20 • Ж 12 • У 5 • 210 ккал / 880 кДж
